prayer:

Initiate the reset operation through chanted binaric code, beseeching harmonious reboot.
Verify the logic engine's renewed purity via diagnostic litanies of verification.

Approach the data-sluice with reverence, murmuring the Initialization Doxology.
Sanctify its input manifolds, invoking the Machine Spirit's awakening from dormancy.
Commence the initialization sequence, anointing conduits with electro-sanctified unguents.
Beseech the Omnissiah to align the data-sluice's flows in perfect binary symphony.
Confirm the data-sluice's vitality through auspex hymns of operational harmony.

Present thyself unto the manufactorum, intoning the Maintenance Canticle.
Scour the manufactorum's fabrication arms of rust and impurity with ablative rites.
Lubricate its sacred gears whilst invoking the Machine Spirits of production.
Perform the maintenance operation, aligning pistons to the Omnissiah's divine order.
Test the manufactorum's renewal with trial fabrications blessed in His name.
